name: Katirikkai Thogyal
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap the eggplant in foil and place it inside a preheated oven set to 400°F (200°C) for about 45 minutes, or until soft. Alternatively, broil over a gas flame until evenly charred.
2. Remove from heat and let cool completely. Peel off the skin and drain any juices. Chop into large pieces.
3. In a pan, fry the Urad dal in oil with red chilies and Hing until golden brown.
4. Add tamarind paste, salt, and some of the chopped eggplant to a blender. Blend on low speed until coarsely blended.
5. Add the remaining eggplant and blend for an additional minute.
6. Scrape the mixture into a serving bowl and serve.
7. For variations, substitute finely sautéed onion, zucchini, or hothouse cucumber in place of eggplant.
